SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email, employee_number, shift, role, category, is_active, is_verified, seniority_date
FROM employees
WHERE first_name LIKE '%Evonne%' OR last_name LIKE '%Seisa%' OR email LIKE '%evonne%' OR email LIKE '%seisa%';
